summary.goal: Enforce memex development workflow automatically without per-session reminders
decisions: Added .claude/settings.json with systemPrompt to fire workflow instructions every session
Strengthened CLAUDE.md directive from descriptive to imperative (IMPORTANT block)
Removed .claude from root .gitignore; added .claude/.gitignore to keep settings.local.json untracked

rejected_approaches.description: UserPromptSubmit hook to prepend workflow text
rejected_approaches.reason: Heavy-handed — affects all prompts and adds noise; systemPrompt is project-scoped and cleaner
